text:

net/tcptracroute-devel REVIVE -- svn diff

See also net-tcptraceroute-QA, for requisite QA,
also attached.

Thanks!

--Chris

P.S. I'm not sure about the ${CHMOD}. But it was there, so I
left it, for greater powers to decide on. :)
